channel.title: Ember Language — News
channel.description: Releases, milestones, and announcements from the Ember language project.

item.title: Ember v0.3.42 — Unified Fault errors, interactive dock, and public launch
item.description:
Ember v0.3.42 is the first publicly released version of the language and compiler.

Highlights: a unified Fault error-artifact system with structured diagnostics, an
interactive docking UI layer (Flare), the M:N green-thread scheduler (gated), and
a complete install script at ember-lang.org/start.

The Flare UI layer — Ember's declarative immediate-mode GUI — now ships with spring
physics animations, FLIP layout transitions, presence enter/exit, toast notifications,
selectable code blocks, a draggable splitter, and idle-CPU event gating (~0% CPU when
nothing is happening).

item.title: M:N green-thread scheduler lands (gated)
item.description:
The M:N cooperative scheduler (EMBER_MN) is now built and gated. A worker pool
(≈ ncpu threads) multiplexes many cooperatively-yielding fibers that park on channels
rather than blocking OS threads. Verified TSan- and ASan-clean; 8000 fibers in one
nursery confirmed working. The default remains the proven cooperative N:1 scheduler
pending a wider soak.
